shortDescription: Baseball darts scoring for casual matches, league play, practice, and stats.
fullDescription: RBDarts helps darts players run baseball darts matches with secure sign-in, clear scoring, correction workflows, league support, practice sessions, and summary stats. The native iOS app is built for quick score entry, stable recovery during active matches, and privacy-first launch behavior.
releaseNotes: Initial launch candidate with standalone baseball darts scoring, league workflows, practice mode, stats, secure SSO, and privacy/support links.
